text:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
PSDS_MEDICARE Personality Disorders - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
PSDS_COMBINED_EVER Personality Disorders - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
PSDS_MEDICAID_EVER Personality Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date -
